case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. SHERI RAE BAILEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,394.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY, SHERI RAE REED, ENICK MAURICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO SHERI RAE BAILEY RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NO SUCH NUMBER, UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RE:RESET; FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL--COLLECTION SERVICES MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-27-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-14-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.99 SERVED MAY-02-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY, SHERI RAE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.99 SERVED MAY-02-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REED, ENICK MAURICE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAILEY, SHERI RAE REED, ENICK MAURICE $2,394.00 PRINCIPAL, $101.98 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,495.98, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANTS ACTS CONSTITUTE FRAUDULENT CONDUCT UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTIONS 1709 AND 1710 BASED ON THE FINDING OF AN INTENTIONAL PROGRAM VIOLATION AT THE TIME OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE HEARING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
